name: Arras Minerals Corp.
description: Arras Minerals Corp. is a Canadian exploration and development company focused on discovering and developing large-scale copper-gold porphyry deposits in Kazakhstan. The company holds a significant land package in the highly prospective Bozshakol-Chingiz volcanic arc, including the flagship Beskauga copper-gold project. Led by an experienced management team and board with a track record of discovery and development success, Arras Minerals is well-positioned to unlock value in one of the world's premier underexplored copper-gold belts.
